title: Add username/password authentication for test creation

requirements.text: Add authentication requirement for test creation: only users with username 'sayemahtesham' and password '12345678' can create tests. No authentication is required for taking tests or viewing responses.

quotes: To create test just username and password is required. Username . sayemahtesham Password . 12345678

acceptanceCriteria: When user clicks 'Create Test' button, a login modal appears requiring username and password
Successful login with username 'sayemahtesham' and password '12345678' allows access to the test creation panel
Invalid credentials show an error message and prevent access to test creation
Students can still take tests and view responses without any authentication
Authentication state persists during the session so user doesn't need to re-login for multiple test creations

requirements.text: Implement backend authentication validation function that verifies username is 'sayemahtesham' and password is '12345678' before allowing test creation operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend has a validation function that checks provided credentials against hardcoded values
createTest function only proceeds if credentials are valid
Invalid credentials return an error response that frontend can display

requirements.text: Create a login modal component that appears before test creation, collecting username and password fields with a login button and error message display area.
acceptanceCriteria: Login modal appears when 'Create Test' button is clicked and user is not authenticated
Modal contains username field, password field (masked), and login button
Modal displays validation errors for incorrect credentials
Modal closes automatically on successful authentication and opens the test creation panel
Modal follows the existing minimal white background with soft blue accents design system

constraints: Do not modify the existing student test-taking flow or response viewer access
Do not change existing authentication implementation for Internet Identity if present
nonGoals: Implementing a full user registration system
Adding multiple user accounts or user management
Implementing role-based access control beyond this single admin user
